description_long: This kiosk is a compact, rectangular structure with a predominantly white exterior and clean, modern lines. The front and sides are adorned with printed signage, including the brand name 'DualLux' and the product description 'SUPORTE PARA FERRO DE SOLDA' in bold, colored text. The packaging features a large, clear product image of a soldering iron stand, emphasizing its function. The top of the kiosk has a small, integrated hanging tab, suggesting portability or display capability. The surface is smooth and hard, with a matte finish and minimal decorative elements. There are no visible windows or doors, and the overall design is utilitarian and straightforward.
description: A compact, white kiosk with bold printed signage and a product image, featuring a smooth, hard surface and a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main signage 'SUPORTE PARA FERRO DE SOLDA' and a large product image, with a clean, flat surface.
description_view_1: Side view displays the 'DualLux' logo, additional product text, and a partial view of the hanging tab at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view repeats the main signage and product image, with a clear view of the top hanging tab.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a detailed product description in Portuguese and the 'DualLux' logo at the bottom.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign with product name and brand logo on front, sides, and rear; includes product image and descriptive text.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top with integrated hanging tab; made of cardboard with no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern utilitarian with minimalist branding and clean lines.
